name: openproject
description: Codex plugin for browsing OpenProject projects and managing work packages through the API v3.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect projects and manage work packages in OpenProject.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to an OpenProject instance so it can find projects, inspect work packages, create new work packages, update existing ones, and add comments through the OpenProject API v3.
defaultPrompt: List my OpenProject projects and recent work packages.
Create an OpenProject task in the right project.
Update an OpenProject work package and add a comment.
